items.title: Bring the benefits of composting to your gardens with this 43-gallon East Oak dual-chamber compost bin at its $66 low
items.summary:
East Oak 43-Gallon Outdoor Tumbling Compost Bin

Buy for $66 (Reg. $85)

What we love

More and more people are learning about the benefits that composting can bring to gardens, and this 43-gallon tumbler is a handy and sensible way to integrate the practice into your life, with it becoming a popular model in NYC that I regularly see in people’s yards and even atop apartment building rooftops. There are two chambers, one for completing the compost process, while the other is for your freshly discarded scraps. Its ability to rotate 360 degrees does away with hand mixing, and it comes with a BPA-free design using PP material for its construction, as well as steel for more eco-friendly durability.
